blended.narrative: Tremblant (Gray Rocks) is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 10 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 4,859 ft. Looking ahead, 23 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 2.9" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 2.9" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
